title: No-Go
content:
I just heard from the news that the Red Cross Annual Fair begins at the end of this month. And this event always brings some unusual traffic to my neighborhood. Combining with the protest that has been going on for almost a week, I take the liberty to declare the "no-go zone".

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/misc/nogozone.jpg!

In fact, I should expand the "no-go zone" out a couple more city block. But I'm too lazy to redo the map (via Google Earth, obviously).

Incidentally, Book Fair starts on March 29 too (@ Queen Sirikit National Convention Center). Will go.

And incidentally again, Motor Show starts on March 24 (@ BITEC). New Accord is coming, MUST GO SEE!!!
